interpretation: Full external residual-level validation remains unavailable.
recommended_action: Keep external branch reopenable only if usable non-SPARC component curves arrive.

threshold_or_context: low ARI means shape clusters do not strongly reproduce seven-zone map
interpretation: DCRRA zones are not simple residual-shape clusters.
public_claim_effect: Do not describe zones as direct shape-template classes.
recommended_action: Use shape audit as one diagnostic layer, not the full classification basis.

threshold_or_context: low-dimensional residual-shape structure exists but does not equal zone taxonomy
interpretation: Residual-shape structure is real enough to audit, but not sufficient as taxonomy.
recommended_action: Carry into synthesis as diagnostic support with taxonomy caution.

threshold_or_context: Phase 5 expanded comparator audit under AIC
interpretation: Over-flexible null absorbs residual structure in many galaxies.
recommended_action: Require fairness/complexity-penalty reporting whenever comparator wins are discussed.

interpretation: Overflex dominance is penalty-sensitive; AIC-only conclusions are unsafe.
public_claim_effect: Do not treat AIC comparator dominance as physical evidence.
recommended_action: Report AIC, AICc, and BIC sensitivity together.

interpretation: Comparator and regime behavior is associated with observational / baryonic proxies.
recommended_action: Stratify by n_points, velocity scale, and residual-shape error in downstream summaries.

interpretation: A nontrivial subset carries elevated failure-boundary risk.
public_claim_effect: Do not hide high-risk cases when reporting population-level structure.
recommended_action: Preserve high-risk ledgers and examples in repository.

interpretation: Frozen holdouts are stable, but boundary cautions remain for restricted subsets and leaveout shifts.
public_claim_effect: Internal robustness may be stated only within SPARC protocol.

interpretation: Synthetic injection-recovery is not sufficiently supported by frozen rules.
public_claim_effect: Do not present DCRRA zones as strong classifiers.
recommended_action: Treat injection-recovery failure as a central no-go boundary.

threshold_or_context: weakest synthetic class under frozen recovery
interpretation: HALO_LIKE is weakly recovered under the tested protocol.
public_claim_effect: Do not infer stable physical-like template separability.
recommended_action: Carry weak-class details into failure-boundary examples.

interpretation: Recovery degrades materially under high-noise injections.
recommended_action: Report noise-stratified recovery in any synthesis paper.

interpretation: Separability limitation persists after diagnostic repair audit.
public_claim_effect: DCRRA is not a physical-category classifier.
recommended_action: Lock separability limitation in claim boundary and future manuscript reader guidance.

threshold_or_context: largest off-diagonal confusion in synthetic separability audit
interpretation: Physical-like / comparator-like adjacent types remain confusable.
public_claim_effect: Do not use synthetic results to promote response/halo/RAR/mixed labels into physical classes.
recommended_action: Use pairwise confusion table as no-go evidence.

threshold_or_context: legacy / Phase0-3 failure-boundary ledger carried forward
interpretation: Earlier boundary notes remain part of v3.0.0 ledger.
public_claim_effect: Do not overwrite earlier caveats when integrating new phases.
